data.title: Update all inline CLAUDE.md rule 4 citations in skill files to reference new throttling rule
data.description:
## Description

Find and update all inline references to the old CLAUDE.md rule #4 ("5 sub-agents", "groups of 5", "batches of 5") in skill files under plugins/dso/skills/.

Known locations:
- fix-bug/SKILL.md (lines ~976, ~984)
- Any other skill files found via: grep -rn "5 sub-agents\|groups of 5\|batches of 5\|rule.*4.*sub-agents" plugins/dso/skills/

Replace with references to the new rule text (orchestration.max_agents config key and throttle tiers).

### Unit test exemption justification
1. No conditional logic — text replacement in prompt files
2. Tests are negative constraints (grep for absence)
3. Infrastructure-boundary-only — prompt file text

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md (modify)
- Any other skill files with old rule citations (modify)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] No inline "5 sub-agents" citations remain in skill files
  Verify: ! grep -rq "5 sub-agents\|groups of 5" plugins/dso/skills/
- [ ] fix-bug/SKILL.md updated
  Verify: ! grep -q "5 sub-agents\|groups of 5" plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md
- [ ] All existing tests still pass
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/run-all.sh
